title: FiscalDataTable
description: A catalog entry for one IBO fiscal data table published on NYC Open Data — the DataTable entity (IBO's Excel-shaped time-series exported to Socrata). Canonical schema describing the 20 IBO Socrata assets (e.g. Revenue And Spending Summary 7zhs-43jt, Capital Expenditures hukm-snmq, School Spending p26e-k6k9) as a uniform, queryable catalog rather than 20 opaque IDs.

updateFrequency.description: Publisher update cadence ('Update-Frequency', e.g. Annually, As needed, Historical data).

columns.description: Column names as published. IBO tables are typically WIDE — one column per fiscal year ('FY 1980' … 'FY 2020') plus a category/line-item column.

shape.description: Derived shape of the table: 'wide-fiscal-year' = one column per FY (the dominant IBO pattern); 'distribution-by-agi' = keyed on income group; 'long' = normalized observations.
